feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman and Red entered the Celadon Underground Path, keeping the route from Lavender to Celadon physical.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red guarded the underpass stairs and warned that Rocket wants the Silph Scope trail followed.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill traced the strongest Silph Scope signal to Celadon's Game Corner district.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Rocket smugglers are using the Underground Path to move equipment between Lavender pressure points and Celadon.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: A Team Moonlight dream poster in the underpass links Lavender's haunting pressure to Celadon's city lights.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: The Silph Scope and Game Corner are now confirmed as the same story thread.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Celadon City arrival is unlocked as the next major Kanto hub.
